cards.back: A distributed system is a collection of independent computers that appear to be a single, coherent system to the users
There are two main types of distributed systems: Homogeneous and Heterogeneous systems
A homogeneous distributed system consists of identical computers connected through a network
A heterogeneous distributed system consists of computers of different types connected through a network
Distributed systems exhibit the following characteristics: Decentralization, Autonomy, and Multiplicity
